profile.name: Michael Magdy Mitry
profile.title: Visual Artist, Filmmaker & Full-Stack Engineer
profile.tagline: FILMMAKER · VISUAL ARTIST · NEW CAIRO, EGYPT
profile.bio: Multidisciplinary creator with a unique background in Architecture, Commercial Aviation, and Filmmaking. I build high-end visual effects, cinematic campaigns, and data-driven software that bridges creative vision with engineering precision.
profile.bioLong: I'm Michael Magdy Mitry — a Filmmaker, Visual Effects Artist, and Full-Stack Engineer based in New Cairo, Egypt. My background spans Architecture, Commercial Aviation, and Filmmaking, giving me an uncommon ability to approach complex problems from multiple angles. I specialize in high-end VFX and cinematic content for international campaigns, and I build highly interactive, data-driven web applications using the React ecosystem and Google Cloud. Every project is a chance to push the boundaries of what's visually and technically possible.

services.title: Visual Effects & Filmmaking
services.description: High-end VFX, cinematic content, and full video production workflows for international campaigns and brands.

services.title: Web & App Development
services.description: Full-stack web applications with React 19, TypeScript, Firebase, and Google Cloud Run. From CRM systems to interactive platforms.

services.title: Photo Editing & Design
services.description: High-end retouching, color grading, brand identity, and UI/UX design for premium visual experiences.

experience.description: Creates high-end visual effects and cinematic content for international campaigns. Leads video production workflows, mentors junior editors, and integrates AI-driven tools into post-production pipelines to optimize rendering times.

Architected and built a full custom CRM system for a boxing club from scratch — React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4 frontend with a serverless Firebase/Node.js backend deployed on Google Cloud Run via Docker. Features include advanced sales attribution, audit logging, automated PDF reporting, CSV parsing, and QR code integration.

Developed a comprehensive interactive e-learning platform for Airline Transport Pilot Licence (ATPL) students. Built an SVG aircraft inspector, PANS-OPS holding calculators, and translated EASA regulations into dynamic architectural trees and searchable glossaries.
Constructed complex architectural models and technical drawings for large-scale urban projects. Coordinated with multi-disciplinary teams to ensure design feasibility and regulatory compliance.

education.degree: Bachelor of Architecture and Environmental Design
education.school: Arab Academy For Science And Technology
education.note: Graduation Project: 'ReviveTech' — AI-integrated urban redevelopment plan. Grade: A-. Student Activities Media Head (2020–2022).
Deep practical and theoretical knowledge of EASA regulations, IFR procedures, and PANS-OPS.
